tasks.deploy:create: bash setup-static.sh && deno deploy create --source local --framework-preset fresh
tasks.mac:build: deno compile --target aarch64-apple-darwin --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --include static --include routes --output dist/2028ai-mac main.ts
tasks.mac:build-intel: deno compile --target x86_64-apple-darwin --allow-net --allow-read --allow-env --include static --include routes --output dist/2028ai-mac-intel main.ts
